findings.issue: TDD Anchor section is still present and contains an explicit 'Unit tests not written' stub: 'Globals не имеют бизнес-логики — только конфигурация структуры Payload и хук ревалидации. Unit-тесты не пишутся.' Per template: 'For non-code tasks (user instructions, deploy, config) — delete this section. No empty stubs.' A section that explicitly says no tests are written is an empty stub and must be removed.
findings.fix: Delete the entire '## TDD Anchor' section from Task 7. Smoke verification is already present in Verification Steps → Smoke.

findings.issue: Mandatory context file 'project.md' is still missing from Task 7. Template requires project.md as a mandatory context file for all tasks. This finding was flagged in r1 and not fixed.
findings.fix: Add: '- [project.md](~/.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/project.md)' to the Context Files section.

findings.issue: Mandatory context file 'project.md' path uses incorrect format '.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/project.md' (missing leading '~/'). This path will not resolve correctly — it is a relative path from CWD rather than the standard home-relative '~/.claude/...' path used in all other tasks. The r1 finding required adding project.md; a file was added but with a broken path.
findings.fix: Change path from '.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/project.md' to '~/.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/project.md'. Same fix applies to architecture.md and patterns.md in Task 6 which use the same broken format.

findings.issue: 'Implementation hints' subsection is absent from the Details section. The section uses 'Важные нюансы' (important nuances) instead of the required '**Implementation hints:**' label. This was flagged as major in r1 and not corrected — 'Важные нюансы' is not a recognized subsection name per the template checklist which requires: Files, Dependencies, Edge cases, Implementation hints.
findings.fix: Rename '**Важные нюансы:**' to '**Implementation hints:**' to match the required subsection label.

findings.issue: Tech-spec for Task 8 lists reviewers: 'code-reviewing, test-master'. Task 8 frontmatter adds 'security-auditor' which is not in the tech-spec for this task. Additionally, 'test-reviewer' is used instead of 'test-master' (the skill name in tech-spec). The Reviewers section body lists 'security-auditor' and 'test-reviewer' consistent with frontmatter but inconsistent with tech-spec.
findings.fix: Remove 'security-auditor' from frontmatter and body (not in tech-spec for Task 8). Decide on consistent naming: either align all tasks to tech-spec names ('code-reviewing', 'test-master') or to validator-rule names ('code-reviewer', 'test-reviewer'). The tech-spec names are the source of truth for reviewer selection. Update frontmatter to: reviewers: [code-reviewing, test-master] and body accordingly.

findings.issue: Context file links for project-knowledge files still use relative path format '../../.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/...' instead of the standard '~/.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/...' format. This was flagged in r1 and not fixed. Relative paths are fragile and depend on CWD at invocation time.
findings.fix: Replace '../../.claude/' prefix with '~/.claude/' in project.md, architecture.md, and patterns.md links.

findings.issue: Context file paths for architecture.md and patterns.md use '~/.claude/skills/project-knowledge/architecture.md' (without /references/ subdirectory), while tasks 9, 10, and the template consistently use '~/.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/architecture.md'. This path inconsistency was flagged in r1 and not fixed.
findings.fix: Update task 8 context file paths to: '~/.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/architecture.md', '~/.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/patterns.md', '~/.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/project.md'. Verify the actual directory structure to confirm which path is correct.

findings.issue: Context file 'testing.md' is absent for Task 9, which has a TDD Anchor section with 4 test entries for articles-merge functionality. This was flagged in r1 and not fixed.
findings.fix: Add: '- [testing.md](~/.claude/skills/project-knowledge/testing.md)' (or the /references/ variant, depending on the correct path).

findings.issue: Context file 'testing.md' is absent for Task 10, which has a TDD Anchor section with 8 test entries for the API route. This was flagged in r1 and not fixed.

Frontmatter uses reviewer name 'code-reviewer' but tech-spec Task 6 specifies 'code-reviewing'. Across the batch, Task 7 correctly uses 'code-reviewing' (matching tech-spec), while Tasks 6, 8, 9, 10 use 'code-reviewer'. Similarly, 'test-reviewer' is used in Tasks 8, 9, 10 where tech-spec specifies 'test-master'. This naming inconsistency may route reviews to the wrong agent.
findings.fix: Standardize reviewer names to match tech-spec across all tasks: use 'code-reviewing' instead of 'code-reviewer', and 'test-master' instead of 'test-reviewer'. Tasks 6, 8, 9, 10 need update to frontmatter and Reviewers body section. Update report paths accordingly: 'code-reviewing-{round}.json', 'test-master-{round}.json'.

findings.issue: Context file 'testing.md' is absent from Task 6. While Task 6 is a configuration-only task (no TDD Anchor), the tech-spec lists 'code-reviewing, security-auditor' as reviewers — reviewers typically expect testing context. Low priority since Task 6 has no testable code logic.
findings.fix: Optionally add '- [testing.md](~/.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/testing.md)'. Can be omitted if config-only tasks are exempted.

findings.issue: Context file 'testing.md' is absent from Task 7. While Globals have no unit tests, keeping context consistent with other tasks in the wave improves readability. Low priority.
findings.fix: Optionally add '- [testing.md](~/.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/testing.md)'. Can be omitted if config-only tasks are exempted.
